name: crispr-primer-design
description: Design and verify PCR + nested Sanger primers to validate CRISPR-Cas9 cutting at a gRNA locus (ICE / TIDE / amplicon-NGS). One-shot pipeline: resolves the locus (Ensembl with NCBI pseudogene fallback), locates the gRNA and cut site, generates and scores all primer candidates in a single sweep, hard-verifies every primer against the genome, and emits a markdown report + wild-type amplicon FASTA.
